creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

You haven't addressed EITHER problem. 
Where did I mention /usr/bin?  Xemacs send-pr refers to /usr/share/gnats/xemacs.org?  It should have been /usr/local/share/gnats/xemacs.org.  THIS IS A  
PREFIX PROBLEM. 
Xemacs's `send-pr' needs to be renamed.
